content_en:
—— The Prophetic Medicine

have stated, this matter has a lot to de with evil spirits, which will be stopped from producing harm if washed by water. In addition, it might be that washing with water serves to cool the heart and thus cures the person who was about to touch others with the evil eye. Sometimes, when a poisonous insect bites someone and then the insect is killed, the bitten person feels a little relief afterwards. This might occur because the bitten person feels joy that the insect was killed and this feeling of elation helps to cure the poison faster. In short, when the person who touches others with the evil eye is washed, the evil that he thought of or felt will be washed away with the water.

If someons asks, “If washing with the water helps the aggressor, then what about the victim of the evil eye?"

We say that pouring the water on victims of the evil eye In addition helps cool the effect of the evil eye on the victim just as it extinguished the veiled thoughts from the aggressor's heart. Water, which is used to cool burning iron rods, is In addition often used as a medicine with which the doctors would concur. It is natural that the same water used to extinguish the evil eye is used to rid the victim of the evil eye of its effect.

Therefore, comparing the Prophetic medicine to regular medicine that doctors use is just like comparing the doctor's medicine to folk medicines. Rather, the comparison is even less appropriate, for the difference

between the Prophets and the doctors is profoundly greater than the difference between the doctors and those who are not qualified to practice medicine. You should have discovered by now the brotherly relation between religion and wisdom, and that they never contradict each other. Allah guides whom He wills to the straight path and opens the doors of success to those who knock on such doors. He Alone is the Source of all bounties and irrefutable proofs. Fighting the evil eye is more likely to be successful if one conceals his blessings from the people.

For instance, AlI-Baghawi narrated that once Uthman saw a handsome boy and commanded, "Blacken his cleft chin so that the evil eye does not touch him."

Al-Khattabi In addition narrated in Gharib AIHadith, "It was narrated that Uthman once saw a handsome boy and that he said, 'Hide his cleft chin with black color." Uthman wanted to hide the cleft chin of the handsome boy using black color so that he was not touched by the evil eye.

Another Islamic prayer formula that helps ward off the evil eye was related by Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Tayya‘hi he was once traveling for Hajj or Jihad using a good animal. There was a man in the caravan who would never look at something but would bring it to its demise. Abu ‘Abdullah was then told, ‘Preserve your camel from this

—— The Prophetic Medicine

man's eye.’ He said, 'My camel cannot be touched by harm.’ The person who touched with the evil eye was informed of Abu 'Abdullah's response and he waited for a chance when Abu ‘Abdullah was not present and looked at the camel which soon fell on its feet! When Abu ‘Abdullah came and was told that the person had touched it with the evil eye and that his camel was suffering, as was evident, he said, ‘Show me the man.' When he came by him he said, 'In the Name of Allah a restraint that restrains, a hard rock and a blazing star: I ask that the evil eye returns to the person who started it and on the most dear people to him (meaning the envious person himself)"

LD (*) € 5 poled oe SF Ua ped! ae 5b opts Allah said:

Then look again: "Can you see any rifts?” Then look again and yet again, your sight will return to you in a state of humiliation and worn out." (67:3,4)

Then, the person known for the evil eye lost his sight and the camel was cured.*

The Prophet's guidance on treating sickness in general with Islamic prayer formulas Muslim narrated

that Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri said that Jibril came to the Prophet b and said to him:

"O Muhammad ! Are you complaining from an illness?" He said,

"Yes." jibril then said, "In the Name of Allah I say Islamic prayer formulas for your benefit, from every illness that might harm you and from the evil of every evil soul or envious evil eye. Allah will cure you, in the Name of Allah I say Islamic prayer formulas for your benefit."

If someone asks, "What do you say about the Hadith that Abu Dawood narrated:

"There is no Islamic prayer formula except for an evil eye or fever."

"There is no Islamic prayer formula (that works

—— The Prophetic Medicine

better) than in the cases of evil eye and the fever."

In addition, the various Ahadeeth in general allow Islamic prayer formulas. For instance, Muslim narrated that the Prophet a& allowed using Islamic prayer formulas in the cases of the evil eye, fever and Namlah (ant's bite or sores).

The Prophet's guidance on treating one bitten (by an animal) by reciting AI-Fatihah

In the Sahihain [In addition At-Termezey, Ibn Mdjah and Ahmad] it is narrated that Abu Sa'id AIKhudri said, "Some of the Companions of the Prophet “ went on a journey till they reached some of the Arab tribes (at night). They asked the latter to treat them as their guests but they refused. The chief of that tribe was then bitten by a snake (or stung by a scorpion) and they tried their best to cure him but in vain. Some of them said (to the others), ‘Nothing has benefited him, will you go to the people who resided here at night, it may be that some of them might possess something (as treatment),' They went to the group of the companions (of the Prophet b) and said, 'Our chief has been bitten by a snake (or stung by a scorpion) and we have tried everything but he has not benefited. Have you got anything (useful)?' One of them replied, "Yes, by Allah! I can recite an Islamic prayer formula, but as you have refused to accept us as your guests, I will not recite the Islamic prayer formula

The Prophetic Medicine ———

for you unless you fix for us some wages for it.’ They agreed to pay them a flock of sheep. One of them then recited (The chapter Al-Fatihah): 'All the praises are for the Lord of the Worlds’ and puffed over the chief who became alright as if he was released from a chain, and got up and started walking, showing no signs of sickness. They paid them what they agreed to pay. Some of them (i.e., the Companions) then suggested to divide their earnings among themselves, but the one who performed the recitation said, 'Do not divide them till we go to the Prophet sg and narrate the whole story to him, and wait for his order.’ So, they went to Allah's Messenger b and narrated the story. Allah's Messenger asked:

"How did you come to know that the chapter AIFatihah could be recited as an Islamic prayer formula?"

"You have done the right thing. Divide (what you have earned) and assign a share for me as well."

It is a well-known fact that certain types of speech have a profound effect and benefit that experience testifies to. So how about the Words of the Lord of the Worlds that are as preferred to the ereation's speech as Allah is preferred above His creation? Allah's Words contain the ultimate cure, the perfect immunity, correct guidance and an encompassing mercy, that if it was

——— The Prophetic Medicine

revealed to a mountain, it would tum to dust in appreciation of Allah's Glory. Allah said:

"And We send down of the Qura'an that which is a healing and a meicy to those who believe (in Islamic Monotheism )

"Allah has promised those among them who believe (i.e., all those who follow Islamic Monotheism, the religion of Prophet Muhammad b till the Day of Resurrection) and do righteous good deeds, forgiveness and a mighty reward (i.e.. Paradise)." s

What could one think of the opening of the Qura'an (AI-Fatihah, the first chapter) that is not comparable to any Verse or chapter revealed in the Qura'an, the Torah, the Gospel or the Zabur (that was revealed to Prophet Dawood b). The AI-Fatihah contains the general meaning of all the Divine Books sent down by Allah. It contains Allah's Names and Attributes, such as Allah, the Robb (Lord), Ar-Rahman (Most Merciful) and Ar-RahIm (Most Beneficent). It In addition affirms Resurrection, Allah's Oneness in Lordship. It In addition mentions the creation's dependence on Allah's help and guidance and that He Alone grants such bounties. It In addition contains the best and most beneficial supplication that the creation needs:

being guided to the Straight Path that entails 218

acquiring knowledge of His Names and Attributes, worshipping Him alone, obeying His Commands, refraining from His prohibitions and staying firm on this path until death. It In addition contains the kinds of creation that are divided into those who have acquired the bounty of knowing the Truth, and who prefer and implement its implications. On the other hand, there are those who have earned Allah's Anger by avoiding the truth after knowing it and there are those who are led astray from the True Path. These are the camps that the creation is divided into. In addition, the AI-Fatihah affirms Predestination and the Commandments of the religion, Allah's Names and Attributes, Resurrection and Prophethood. It In addition purifies the heart and mentions Allah's Justice and Generosity. It In addition refutes all types of innovations and evil methods. We mentioned all these virtues for the Al-Fatihah in our book that explains it, Madariju As-Salikin. Certainly, a chapter that contains all these virtues and benefits deserves to be used as a cure for disease, as well as an antidote for poisonous stings.

Indeed, Al-Fatihah is the best cure because it contains sincere servitude to Allah, praising Him, relating all bounties to Him, seeking His help and support, and invoking Him for all types of advantages, such as the correct guidance that brings about benefit and fends off torment.
content_id:
—— Pengobatan Nabawi

telah menyatakan, masalah ini sangat berkaitan dengan roh-roh jahat, yang akan terhenti dari menghasilkan bahaya jika dicuci dengan air. Selain itu, mungkin saja membasuh dengan air berfungsi untuk mendinginkan hati dan dengan demikian menyembuhkan orang yang hendak menyentuh orang lain dengan mata jahat. Terkadang, ketika seekor serangga berbisa menggigit seseorang dan kemudian serangga itu dibunuh, orang yang digigit merasa sedikit lega setelahnya. Ini mungkin terjadi karena orang yang digigit merasakan kegembiraan bahwa serangga itu telah dibunuh dan perasaan gembira ini membantu menyembuhkan racun lebih cepat. Singkatnya, ketika orang yang menyentuh orang lain dengan mata jahat dicuci, kejahatan yang ia pikirkan atau rasakan akan terbasuh bersama air tersebut.

Jika seseorang bertanya, "Jika membasuh dengan air membantu si pelaku, lalu bagaimana dengan korban mata jahat?"

Kami katakan bahwa menuangkan air pada korban mata jahat juga membantu mendinginkan efek mata jahat pada korban sebagaimana ia memadamkan pikiran tersembunyi dari hati si pelaku. Air, yang digunakan untuk mendinginkan batang besi yang membara, juga sering digunakan sebagai obat yang para dokter pun akan setuju. Adalah wajar bahwa air yang sama yang digunakan untuk memadamkan mata jahat digunakan untuk membebaskan korban mata jahat dari efeknya.

Oleh karena itu, membandingkan pengobatan Nabawi dengan pengobatan biasa yang digunakan para dokter ibarat membandingkan pengobatan dokter dengan pengobatan rakyat. Bahkan, perbandingan itu pun kurang tepat, karena perbedaan

antara para Nabi dan para dokter jauh lebih besar daripada perbedaan antara para dokter dan mereka yang tidak berkualifikasi untuk berpraktik kedokteran. Anda seharusnya telah menemukan hubungan persaudaraan antara agama dan hikmah, dan bahwa keduanya tidak pernah saling bertentangan. Allah memberi petunjuk kepada siapa yang Dia kehendaki ke jalan yang lurus dan membukakan pintu keberhasilan bagi mereka yang mengetuk pintu tersebut. Dia semata-mata adalah Sumber segala karunia dan bukti yang tak terbantahkan. Melawan mata jahat lebih mungkin berhasil jika seseorang menyembunyikan nikmatnya dari orang lain.

Misalnya, Al-Baghawi meriwayatkan bahwa suatu ketika Utsman melihat seorang anak laki-laki yang tampan dan memerintahkan, "Hitamkan lekuk dagunya agar mata jahat tidak menyentuhnya."

Al-Khattabi juga meriwayatkan dalam Gharib Al-Hadith, "Diriwayatkan bahwa Utsman suatu ketika melihat seorang anak laki-laki yang tampan dan berkata, 'Sembunyikan lekuk dagunya dengan warna hitam.'" Utsman ingin menyembunyikan lekuk dagu anak tampan itu menggunakan warna hitam agar ia tidak terkena mata jahat.

Ruqyah lain yang membantu menangkal mata jahat diriwayatkan oleh Abu 'Abdullah Al-Tayya'hi bahwa ia pernah bepergian untuk haji atau jihad menggunakan hewan tunggangan yang bagus. Ada seorang laki-laki dalam rombongan yang tidak pernah memandang sesuatu kecuali membawanya pada kehancuran. Abu 'Abdullah kemudian diberitahu, 'Lindungi untamu dari

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

mata orang ini.' Ia berkata, 'Untaku tidak bisa tersentuh bahaya.' Orang yang menyentuh dengan mata jahat itu diberitahu tentang jawaban Abu 'Abdullah dan ia menunggu kesempatan ketika Abu 'Abdullah tidak ada lalu memandang unta itu yang segera jatuh terduduk! Ketika Abu 'Abdullah datang dan diberitahu bahwa orang itu telah menyentuhnya dengan mata jahat dan untanya menderita, sebagaimana tampak jelas, ia berkata, 'Tunjukkan padaku orang itu.' Ketika ia mendatanginya, ia berkata, 'Dengan Nama Allah, pengekang yang mengekang, batu keras dan bintang yang menyala: aku memohon agar mata jahat kembali kepada orang yang memulainya dan kepada orang yang paling dicintainya (yakni si pendengki itu sendiri).'"

LD (*) € 5 poled oe SF Ua ped! ae 5b opts Allah berfirman:

Kemudian pandanglah sekali lagi: "Adakah kamu lihat sesuatu yang tidak seimbang?" Kemudian pandanglah sekali lagi niscaya penglihatanmu akan kembali kepadamu dalam keadaan hina dan lelah." (QS. Al-Mulk: 3-4)

Kemudian, orang yang dikenal dengan mata jahat itu kehilangan penglihatannya dan unta itu pun sembuh.*

Petunjuk Nabi tentang mengobati penyakit secara umum dengan ruqyah. Muslim meriwayatkan

bahwa Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri berkata bahwa Jibril datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata kepadanya:

"Wahai Muhammad! Apakah engkau mengeluhkan suatu penyakit?" Beliau menjawab,

"Ya." Jibril kemudian berkata, "Dengan Nama Allah aku membacakan ruqyah untukmu, dari setiap penyakit yang mungkin menyakitimu dan dari kejahatan setiap jiwa yang jahat atau mata jahat yang dengki. Allah akan menyembuhkanmu, dengan Nama Allah aku membacakan ruqyah untukmu."

Jika seseorang bertanya, "Apa pendapatmu tentang hadith yang diriwayatkan Abu Dawud:

"Tidak ada ruqyah kecuali untuk mata jahat atau demam."

"Tidak ada ruqyah (yang lebih manjur)

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

daripada dalam kasus mata jahat dan demam."

Selain itu, berbagai hadith secara umum membolehkan ruqyah. Misalnya, Muslim meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ membolehkan penggunaan ruqyah dalam kasus mata jahat, demam, dan Namlah (gigitan semut atau luka).

Petunjuk Nabi tentang mengobati orang yang digigit (oleh binatang) dengan membacakan Al-Fatihah

Dalam Sahihain [juga At-Tirmidzi, Ibnu Majah dan Ahmad] diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri berkata, "Beberapa Sahabat Nabi ﷺ melakukan perjalanan hingga mereka sampai di suatu kabilah Arab (pada malam hari). Mereka meminta kabilah itu untuk menjamu mereka sebagai tamu tetapi mereka menolak. Kepala suku itu kemudian digigit ular (atau disengat kalajengking) dan mereka berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menyembuhkannya tetapi sia-sia. Sebagian dari mereka berkata (kepada yang lain), 'Tidak ada yang bermanfaat baginya, maukah kalian pergi kepada orang-orang yang singgah di sini tadi malam, mungkin sebagian dari mereka memiliki sesuatu (sebagai pengobatan).' Mereka pergi kepada rombongan para Sahabat (Nabi ﷺ) dan berkata, 'Kepala suku kami telah digigit ular (atau disengat kalajengking) dan kami telah mencoba segala cara tetapi tidak ada yang bermanfaat. Apakah kalian memiliki sesuatu (yang berguna)?' Salah seorang dari mereka menjawab, 'Ya, demi Allah! Aku bisa membacakan ruqyah, tetapi karena kalian telah menolak menerima kami sebagai tamu, aku tidak akan membacakan ruqyah

Pengobatan Nabawi ———

untuk kalian kecuali kalian menetapkan upah untuk kami.' Mereka sepakat membayar mereka sekawanan domba. Salah seorang dari mereka kemudian membacakan (Surah Al-Fatihah): 'Segala puji bagi Rabb semesta alam' dan meniupkannya pada kepala suku yang langsung sembuh seolah-olah ia dilepaskan dari rantai, lalu bangkit dan mulai berjalan, tidak menunjukkan tanda-tanda sakit. Mereka membayar apa yang telah disepakati. Sebagian dari mereka (yaitu para Sahabat) kemudian mengusulkan untuk membagi pendapatan mereka, tetapi orang yang melakukan pembacaan berkata, 'Jangan dibagi dulu sampai kita pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ dan menceritakan seluruh kisahnya, lalu menunggu perintah beliau.' Maka mereka pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan menceritakan kisah tersebut. Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya:

"Bagaimana kalian tahu bahwa Surah Al-Fatihah bisa dibacakan sebagai ruqyah?"

"Kalian telah melakukan hal yang benar. Bagilah (apa yang telah kalian peroleh) dan tetapkan bagian untukku juga."

Sudah menjadi fakta yang diketahui bahwa jenis-jenis ucapan tertentu memiliki pengaruh dan manfaat yang mendalam yang dibuktikan oleh pengalaman. Lalu bagaimana dengan Firman Rabb semesta alam yang lebih diutamakan dari ucapan makhluk sebagaimana Allah lebih diutamakan di atas ciptaan-Nya? Firman Allah mengandung penyembuhan tertinggi, kekebalan yang sempurna, petunjuk yang benar, dan rahmat yang menyeluruh, yang jika

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

diturunkan ke sebuah gunung, gunung itu akan hancur menjadi debu karena mengagungkan Kemuliaan Allah. Allah berfirman:

"Dan Kami turunkan dari Al-Qur'an sesuatu yang menjadi penyembuh dan rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman (kepada Tauhid)

"Allah menjanjikan kepada orang-orang di antara mereka yang beriman (yaitu semua yang mengikuti Tauhid, agama Nabi Muhammad ﷺ hingga Hari Kiamat) dan mengerjakan amal saleh, ampunan dan pahala yang besar (yaitu Surga)."

Apa yang bisa seseorang pikirkan tentang pembuka Al-Qur'an (Al-Fatihah, surah pertama) yang tidak ada bandingannya dengan ayat atau surah mana pun yang diturunkan dalam Al-Qur'an, Taurat, Injil, atau Zabur (yang diturunkan kepada Nabi Dawud عليه السلام). Al-Fatihah mengandung makna umum dari semua Kitab Ilahi yang diturunkan oleh Allah. Ia mengandung Nama-nama dan Sifat-sifat Allah, seperti Allah, Ar-Rabb (Tuhan), Ar-Rahman (Maha Pengasih) dan Ar-Rahim (Maha Penyayang). Ia juga menegaskan Kebangkitan, Keesaan Allah dalam Rububiyyah. Ia juga menyebutkan ketergantungan makhluk pada pertolongan dan petunjuk Allah dan bahwa Dia semata-mata yang memberikan karunia tersebut. Ia juga mengandung du'a yang terbaik dan paling bermanfaat yang dibutuhkan makhluk:

dibimbing ke Jalan yang Lurus yang mencakup 218

memperoleh pengetahuan tentang Nama-Nama dan Sifat-Sifat-Nya, beribadah kepada-Nya semata, menaati perintah-perintah-Nya, menjauhi larangan-larangan-Nya, dan tetap istiqamah di jalan ini hingga ajal menjemput. Selain itu, surah ini memuat jenis-jenis makhluk yang terbagi menjadi mereka yang telah memperoleh karunia mengenal kebenaran, serta mengutamakan dan mengamalkan konsekuensinya. Di sisi lain, ada mereka yang mendapatkan murka Allah karena menghindari kebenaran setelah mengetahuinya, dan ada pula mereka yang tersesat dari Jalan yang Benar. Inilah kelompok-kelompok yang menjadi pembagian makhluk. Selain itu, Al-Fatihah menegaskan takdir dan hukum-hukum agama, Nama-Nama dan Sifat-Sifat Allah, hari kebangkitan, dan kenabian. Surah ini juga menyucikan hati dan menyebutkan keadilan serta kemurahan Allah. Surah ini juga membantah segala jenis bid'ah dan metode yang buruk. Kami telah menyebutkan semua keutamaan Al-Fatihah ini dalam kitab kami yang menjelaskannya, Madariju As-Salikin. Sungguh, suatu surah yang mengandung semua keutamaan dan manfaat ini layak dijadikan sebagai obat penyembuh penyakit, serta penawar bagi sengatan beracun.

Sesungguhnya, Al-Fatihah adalah obat terbaik karena mengandung penghambaan yang tulus kepada Allah, memuji-Nya, menyandarkan segala nikmat kepada-Nya, memohon pertolongan dan dukungan-Nya, serta berdoa kepada-Nya untuk segala jenis kebaikan, seperti petunjuk yang benar yang mendatangkan manfaat dan menolak azab.

have stated, this matter has a lot to de with evil spirits, which will be stopped from producing harm if washed by water. Another Islamic prayer formula that helps ward off the evil eye was related by Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Tayya‘hi he was once traveling for Hajj or Jihad using a good animal. There was a man in the caravan who would never look at something but would bring it to its demise. Abu ‘Abdullah was then told, ‘Preserve your camel from this

—— The Prophetic Medicine

man's eye.’ He said, 'My camel cannot be touched by harm.’ The person who touched with the evil eye was informed of Abu 'Abdullah's response and he waited for a chance when Abu ‘Abdullah was not present and looked at the camel which soon fell on its feet! When Abu ‘Abdullah came and was told that the person had touched it with the evil eye and that his camel was suffering, as was evident, he said, ‘Show me the man.' When he came by him he said, 'In the Name of الله a restraint that restrains, a hard rock and a blazing star: I ask that the evil eye returns to the person who started it and on the most dear people to him (meaning the envious person himself)"

LD (*) € 5 poled oe SF Ua ped! ae 5b opts الله said:

Then look again: "Can you see any rifts?” Then look again and yet again, your sight will return to you in a state of humiliation and worn out." (67:3,4)

Then, the person known for the evil eye lost his sight and the camel was cured.*

النبي ﷺ's guidance on treating sickness in general with Islamic prayer formulas Muslim narrated

that Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri said that Jibril came to النبي ﷺ b and said to him:

"O Muhammad ! Are you complaining from an illness?" He said,

"Yes." jibril then said, "In the Name of الله I say Islamic prayer formulas for your benefit, from every illness that might harm you and from the evil of every evil soul or envious evil eye. الله will cure you, in the Name of الله I say Islamic prayer formulas for your benefit."

If someone asks, "What do you say about the الحديث that Abu Dawood narrated:

"There is no Islamic prayer formula except for an evil eye or fever."

"There is no Islamic prayer formula (that works

—— The Prophetic Medicine

better) than in the cases of evil eye and the fever."

In addition, the various Ahadeeth in general allow Islamic prayer formulas. For instance, Muslim narrated that النبي ﷺ a& allowed using Islamic prayer formulas in the cases of the evil eye, fever and Namlah (ant's bite or sores).

النبي ﷺ's guidance on treating one bitten (by an animal) by reciting AI-Fatihah

In the Sahihain [In addition At-Termezey, Ibn Mdjah and Ahmad] it is narrated that Abu Sa'id AIKhudri said, "Some of the الصحابة of النبي ﷺ “ went on a journey till they reached some of the Arab tribes (at night). They asked the latter to treat them as their guests but they refused. The chief of that tribe was then bitten by a snake (or stung by a scorpion) and they tried their best to cure him but in vain. Some of them said (to the others), ‘Nothing has benefited him, will you go to the people who resided here at night, it may be that some of them might possess something (as treatment),' They went to the group of the الصحابة (of النبي ﷺ b) and said, 'Our chief has been bitten by a snake (or stung by a scorpion) and we have tried everything but he has not benefited. Have you got anything (useful)?' One of them replied, "Yes, by الله! I can recite an Islamic prayer formula, but as you have refused to accept us as your guests, I will not recite the Islamic prayer formula

The Prophetic Medicine ———

for you unless you fix for us some wages for it.’ They agreed to pay them a flock of sheep. One of them then recited (The chapter Al-Fatihah): 'All the praises are for the Lord of the Worlds’ and puffed over the chief who became alright as if he was released from a chain, and got up and started walking, showing no signs of sickness. They paid them what they agreed to pay. Some of them (i.e., the الصحابة) then suggested to divide their earnings among themselves, but the one who performed the recitation said, 'Do not divide them till we go to النبي ﷺ sg and narrate the whole story to him, and wait for his order.’ So, they went to الله's Messenger b and narrated the story. الله's Messenger asked:

"How did you come to know that the chapter AIFatihah could be recited as an Islamic prayer formula?"

"You have done the right thing. Divide (what you have earned) and assign a share for me as well."

It is a well-known fact that certain types of speech have a profound effect and benefit that experience testifies to. So how about the Words of the Lord of the Worlds that are as preferred to the ereation's speech as الله is preferred above His creation? الله's Words contain the ultimate cure, the perfect immunity, correct guidance and an encompassing mercy, that if it was

——— The Prophetic Medicine

revealed to a mountain, it would tum to dust in appreciation of الله's Glory. الله said:

"And We send down of the Qura'an that which is a healing and a meicy to those who believe (in Islamic Monotheism )

"الله has promised those among them who believe (i.e., all those who follow Islamic Monotheism, the religion of النبي محمد ﷺ b till the Day of Resurrection) and do righteous good deeds, forgiveness and a mighty reward (i.e.. Paradise)." s

What could one think of the opening of the Qura'an (AI-Fatihah, the first chapter) that is not comparable to any Verse or chapter revealed in the Qura'an, the Torah, the Gospel or the Zabur (that was revealed to Prophet Dawood b). The AI-Fatihah contains the general meaning of all the Divine Books sent down by الله. It contains الله's Names and Attributes, such as الله, the Robb (Lord), Ar-Rahman (Most Merciful) and Ar-RahIm (Most Beneficent). It In addition affirms Resurrection, الله's Oneness in Lordship. It In addition mentions the creation's dependence on الله's help and guidance and that He Alone grants such bounties. It In addition contains the best and most beneficial supplication that the creation needs:

being guided to the Straight Path that entails 218

acquiring knowledge of His Names and Attributes, worshipping Him alone, obeying His Commands, refraining from His prohibitions and staying firm on this path until death. It In addition contains the kinds of creation that are divided into those who have acquired the bounty of knowing the Truth, and who prefer and implement its implications. On the other hand, there are those who have earned الله's Anger by avoiding the truth after knowing it and there are those who are led astray from the True Path. These are the camps that the creation is divided into. In addition, the AI-Fatihah affirms Predestination and the Commandments of the religion, الله's Names and Attributes, Resurrection and Prophethood. It In addition purifies the heart and mentions الله's Justice and Generosity. It In addition refutes all types of innovations and evil methods. We mentioned all these virtues for the Al-Fatihah in our book that explains it, Madariju As-Salikin. Certainly, a chapter that contains all these virtues and benefits deserves to be used as a cure for disease, as well as an antidote for poisonous stings.

Indeed, Al-Fatihah is the best cure because it contains sincere servitude to الله, praising Him, relating all bounties to Him, seeking His help and support, and invoking Him for all types of advantages, such as the correct guidance that brings about benefit and fends off torment.
